title: senecio sepium
intro: Senecio sepium, also known as the great burnet-sage or ragwort, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio sepium include its use as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic, making it effective in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Senecio sepium is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, although its consumption should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
